prestazioni: AMG M297 7.3L V12 engine (naturally aspirated) with a bespoke Pagani-spec titanium connecting rods (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-001) and forged Mahle pistons (12.0:1 compression ratio) paired with a custom billet crankshaft (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-002) for 850+ HP at 8,000 RPM and 650 lb-ft of torque at 5,800 RPM

Full titanium 4-2-1 equal-length exhaust system by Capristo (Pagani Cinque GT Evo-specific design, 3.5-inch diameter, Inconel 625 headers) with a straight-pipe configuration and secondary catalytic converters removed, featuring a bespoke X-pipe merge collector for optimized scavenging

Ohlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers (Pagani-specific valving, 1,200 lb/in front springs, 1,500 lb/in rear springs) with carbon fiber top mounts (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-003) and spherical bearing lower control arms (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-004) for sub-2.5Hz frequency response
estetica: Full carbon fiber aero package by Pagani Automobili (Cinque GT Evo-specific) including a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with active Gurney flaps (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-005), rear diffuser with integrated titanium strakes (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-006), and a fixed rear wing with dual-plane design (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-007) generating 1,200 lbs of downforce at 186 mph

Bespoke Brembo GT-RS 6-piston monobloc calipers (Pagani Cinque GT Evo-specific, 420mm front/380mm rear carbon-ceramic rotors with titanium bell housings) finished in gold anodized titanium with Pagani-logoed caliper pistons

Custom bare carbon fiber weave (3K twill) with exposed titanium fasteners (Pagani Part #ZC-GTE-008) for the entire body, including the roof scoop, side skirts, and rear clamshell, paired with a matte clear coat for UV resistance and a satin finish
